personalDataNotice: ersonal Data Collection, Processing, and Use Notification and Consent Form  To facilitate registration and subsequent communication for this event, the organizer will collect the personal information provided by you in this form (including but not limited to name, contact information, email address, etc.).
personalDataUsage: Your personal data will be used exclusively for event registration confirmation, notifications, information provision, and subsequent correspondence. All data will be protected in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act and relevant regulations.  Unless otherwise agreed upon by you or required by law, your personal data will not be disclosed to any third parties or used for any other purposes.
personalDataRights: You have the right to review, correct, request the deletion of, or demand the cessation of the use of your personal data. Please be advised that declining to provide your personal information may impact your eligibility for registration and the receipt of relevant notifications. Please read the above instructions carefully and confirm your consent before submitting this form.
